description:
Ed Gallrein will defeat incumbent Rep. Thomas Massie in the Republican primary in Kentucky’s 4th Congressional District, CNN’s Decision Desk projects.

The district is solidly Republican but the race was a test of President Donald Trump’s control of his party. Massie has drawn the ire of Trump and has broken with Republicans frequently during the president’s second term. As a result, Gallrein, a farmer and former Navy SEAL, was recruited into the race by Trump and his allies. He went into the race with the president’s endorsement.

0:00 Harry Enten reacts to GOP Massie's projected loss in KY
0:53 Scott Jennings: 'I'm not surprised'
3:29 Magic wall with John King
6:21 Jeff Zeleny at Massie HQ

Watch more CNN here: https://cnn.it/4kh5RPe

#Massie #PrimaryElection #News
